title: Sequences, Recurrences, and Discrete Change · Quantity Clinic: Arithmetic Geometric
summary: Forecast savings, inventory, and staged population processes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int arithmetic geometric increment in a discrete recurrence forecast. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model constant differences and constant ratios with arithmetic and geometric sequences.
Represent explicit and recursive sequences and state valid index domains.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
